title: Kiss Me Again
writer: Emile DeNajac, Hanns Kräly, Victorien Sardou
actors: Marie Prevost, Monte Blue, John Roche
plot: Gaston Fleury's (Monte Blue) wife, Loulou (Marie Prevost), takes a perfunctory interest in music but a deeper one in a musician named Maurice (John Roche). Although Gaston has no intention of releasing his wife into the hands of M...
